violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Per interview of staff, the coffee thermos is only washed and rinsed at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Inspector reviewed sanitization procedures with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine (bleach) sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
